svg.text: VLA-JEPA 2.1 with Qwen 3.5 VL — Training Pipeline
Frozen perception (Qwen 3.5 VL · V-JEPA 2.1 ViT-B/384) provides conditioning for two jointly-trained heads: a latent world-model predictor and a flow-matching diffusion policy.
B × V × T × C × H × W
SDPA multimodal feature extractor · bfloat16 autocast
Inserts special tokens into the prompt sequence:
Encodes each view independently → cat along token dim
torch.isin() indexing · both under bfloat16 autocast
Qwen is frozen → torch.no_grad() wraps full Qwen forward pass
cross_attn_dim patched to qwen.hidden_size before action model init
Predicts future video latents from past context + action tokens
GR00T Action Head — DiT-B Flow Matching
State encoder + action encoder + cross-attention DiT
Learns the velocity field for flow-matching denoising
noise: Beta(α=1.5, β=1.0) s=0.999 · 1000 timestep buckets
Inference: 4 Euler denoising steps · Gaussian noise → action chunk [B, 7, 14]
lr base: 3 × 10⁻⁵ cosine min=1e-6 · β=(0.9,0.95) ε=1e-8
wd=1e-4 · fused=true · warmup=1% · freeze: qwen_vl_interface.model, vj_encoder
Images + instruction → Qwen 3.5 VL → extract embodied_action_tokens [B, 32, 1024] → GR00T DiT-B: 4 Euler denoising steps from Gaussian noise → predicted action chunk [B, 7, 14]

batch=80 · repeated_diffusion_steps=2 · gradient_checkpointing=on · channels_last=on · mixed_precision=off (bfloat16 autocast per block) · use_rabc=on · AdamW-8bit · cosine LR · grad_clip=1.0 · compile=off
